Container.Name: etcd
Container.Overview: Distributed reliable key-value store. Used as the coordination + metadata backend for Milvus and other distributed systems, or on its own as a general-purpose consistent KV store. [br]Listens on TCP 2379 for clients; no ports are published to the host by default — consumers on the same Docker network reach it by container name.
Container.Description: etcd is a strongly-consistent distributed key-value store built on Raft. Used by Kubernetes, Milvus, and many other systems for service discovery and shared metadata.

Config.Name: Data
Config.Description: etcd data dir. For best reliability prefer a cache pool / SSD — etcd is fsync-sensitive.

Config.Name: ETCD_AUTO_COMPACTION_MODE
Config.Description: Auto-compaction mode — keeps the data dir from growing unbounded.

Config.Name: ETCD_AUTO_COMPACTION_RETENTION
Config.Description: Keep this many revisions before compacting.
